query: SELECT id, title, slug, confirmationEmailSubject, LEFT(confirmationEmailBody, 300) as email_body_preview FROM landing_pages WHERE title LIKE '%Session%' OR slug LIKE '%session%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3dDnpezfLjGa5dS.c6434c886c49 --database 29hRXSpda4mmakt4QeiCJh --execute SELECT id, title, slug, confirmationEmailSubject, LEFT(confirmationEmailBody, 300) as email_body_preview FROM landing_pages WHERE title LIKE '%Session%' OR slug LIKE '%session%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
